tasks.label: Build MenuMoney APK
tasks.command: cd C:\work\MenuMoney && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug && echo === BUILD COMPLETE === && dir /b app\build\outputs\apk\debug\*.apk

tasks.label: Build MenuMoney APK
tasks.command: cd C:\work\MenuMoney; npx cap sync android; cd android; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug; Write-Host '=== BUILD RESULT ==='; Get-Item app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk | Select-Object Name,Length,LastWriteTime
